abilities.name: Manipulative (11)
abilities.description: When enemy targets with Action, must pass TN 11 Willpower Challenge. On failure, may change target to legal target.

abilities.name: Which One Is Real?
abilities.description: When randomizing targets in melee, may discard card to have attack target character of choice.

actions: (1) Sharp Knife (Melee) | AV: 4 (11) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/2/4 damage. If target engaged with enemy, attack deals +2 damage. Ram Vital Strike: +2 damage and target Slow.

(0) Mimic (Enchanting) | Character changes appearance (clothing but not weapons) to match humanoid within 8 yards. Perfect duplication including voice, scars, birthmarks. Pneumatic limbs appear but not actual. Lasts until used again.
system.notes: Shapeshanger that wears human faces from murdered victims. Change form with thought. Flesh shifts until settling on desired form. Patient and crafty. Wait weeks/months/years impersonating victims.
